backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the RAY INFOTECH MLM backend, including user profile management, member registration, MLM tree/matrix positioning, commission calculation, and role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the AdminPanel.tsx fix ensures authenticated admin users never see a premature 'access denied' message by waiting for identity initialization before evaluating admin privileges.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key changes of each component, page, hook, and utility in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'RAY INFOTECH MLM', mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component setting up TanStack Router with all page routes, React Query, theming, and an AppLayout that shows a full-screen loading spinner while identity is initializing to prevent premature access-denied states.
frontend/src/components/AddMemberForm.ts: Form component for admin-side member registration with fields for name, mobile, email, and optional sponsor ID, including real-time sponsor validation and a success state displaying the assigned member ID.
frontend/src/components/CommissionHistor: Renders a 9-level MLM commission breakdown table showing members, rates, earned commissions, and max potential commissions per level, with locked/unlocked status indicators.
Displays a summary card of a member's total earned vs. potential earnings across all 9 MLM levels, including joining fee refund eligibility status.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component showing copyright year and a branded link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile nav links for Home, Dashboard, Register Member, and Admin, plus login/logout controls using Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wrapper layout component that composes Header, main content area, and Footer into a full-height flex column.
frontend/src/components/MatrixTreeVisual: Renders a visual 3-ary tree of MLM downline members up to a configurable depth, showing member cards with name, ID, active status, and fee payment state.
frontend/src/components/PlatformStatisti: Fetches all members and computes platform-wide stats (total members, fees collected, refunds issued, total commissions) displayed as a grid of summary cards with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to set up their profile (name and contact info) before using the MLM platform, shown only when no existing profile is found.
frontend/src/components/RecruitmentDeadl: A card component that displays a member's recruitment deadline status (Met, Cancelled, or Active with live countdown) and progress toward recruiting 3 direct downlines within 3 days.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user profiles, admin roles, and member lists, all gated on actor and identity readiness.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, and defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the Ray Infotech deep-navy and gold brand theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel page that requires Internet Identity authentication, displaying member management tools including listing members, marking joining fees paid, deleting members, checking membership statuses, and adding new members via a form.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page showing a searchable member list, matrix tree visualization, earnings summary, commission history, and recruitment deadline card for a selected member, with BFS-based downline level computation.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Public landing/home page displaying the platform's hero section, commission structure (levels 1–9 with decreasing percentages), and navigation buttons for authenticated and unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity and redirects them to the admin panel or dashboard based on their role, with loading states to prevent UI flashing during session restoration.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Member registration page with a form for name, mobile, email, and sponsor ID, validating inputs and sponsor existence before submitting, then displaying the newly assigned member ID on success.
frontend/src/utils/deadlineHelpers.ts: Utility functions for handling nanosecond-precision backend timestamps, including formatting dates, computing membership deadline status (Active/Met/Cancelled), and calculating time remaining until a deadline.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist/retrieve values via sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom brand colors (navy, gold), typography/container-query/animate plugins, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, and accordion keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the RAY INFOTECH MLM app, recording a known issue where the admin panel incorrectly shows 'access denied' and tracking the fix feature request to ensure role checks use the authenticated actor after full identity initialization.
